name: Oxfordshire (United Kingdom)
description: A blue field with a white wavy bar and an ox passing across it.
history: Designed in 2017 and registered with the Flag Institute as the flag of Oxfordshire. The ox-fording-water motif is canting (punning) — Oxford means 'ox ford'.

features.symbolism: a canting reference to the county name 'Oxford' (= ox + ford)
